title: Telling Your Younger Self She Is Allowed to Want This
subtitle: A visualisation for releasing the moment you first learned that desire was wrong
excerpt: A visualisation for Day 15 of the money arc. You travel back to meet the version of you who first heard that wanting was greedy — and tell her, clearly and without ceremony, that she was allowed.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Built from the Day 15 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796): releasing guilt about wanting wealth.

practice.whenToUse: On a morning in Week 3 of the money arc, when guilt about financial desire is the thing in the way — and you want to address it at the root.

content.text: A visualisation for Day 15 of the money arc. You meet the version of you who first learned that wanting was wrong — and give her the message she needed then.
New to visualisation as a practice? Read
Sit or lie down. Breathe slowly for a few rounds. Let the day settle before you begin.
Picture the version of you who first learned that wanting was wrong — the child, the teenager, the younger woman. Bring her into focus. Where is she? What is happening around her?
Walk toward her. She may be making herself small, hiding what she wants, already apologising for her desires. Let her see you.

Sit beside her or stand in front of her. Tell her what she needed to hear: that her wanting is not greed. That it is direction. That she is allowed to want this much, and more. Use plain words — not abstract reassurance, but the specific thing she needed someone to say.
Watch what happens in her when she hears it. Let it land. Stay with her until she takes it in fully.
Take a breath and return to the room. The permission you gave her is yours to keep.
Built from the Day 15 theme of
MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout
(Rebecca J Page, 2025): releasing guilt about wanting wealth.
